author: y4rr
content: Plan: Build real-artifact parity harness for ferrotorch-distributions vs torch.distributions per Phase G.1 spec. (1) Inventory public surface, (2) Build scripts/pin_pretrained_distributions_fixtures.py to generate fixtures with torch.manual_seed(42), N=10000 samples, log_prob+entropy at fixed test points, KL for canonical pairs. (3) Build ferrotorch-distributions/examples/distributions_dump.rs to emit moments + log_prob + entropy. (4) Harness scripts/verify_distributions_inference.py with per-metric tolerances (sample mean<=0.05, var<=0.1, log_prob<=1e-4, entropy<=1e-4, KL<=1e-4). (5) tests/conformance_torch_parity.rs ignored-gated wrapper. (6) Upload bundle to ferrotorch/distributions-parity-v1 and pin in registry. Use moment-based comparison (no PRNG byte-match). Probe-then-fix any real bugs surfaced.
